description: A logistics manager needs to choose the most cost-effective shipping carrier for an order.

nodes.task_description: For a packed order, get its weight, dimensions, and destination.

expected_outcome.value: Agent has all the necessary shipment details.

nodes.task_description: Use a rate shopping tool to get real-time shipping quotes from multiple carriers (e.g., UPS, FedEx, USPS).

expected_outcome.value: The tool returns quotes from all available carriers.

nodes.task_description: Select the carrier with the lowest cost for the required service level.

expected_outcome.value: Agent selects the most economical option.

nodes.task_description: Generate the shipping label for the chosen carrier.

expected_outcome.value: The correct shipping label is printed.
